title: ananas sativus f. mordilona
intro: Ananas sativus f. mordilona, also known as the wild pineapple or Mordilona pineapple, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the pineapple plant (Ananas sativus). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Ananas sativus f. mordilona include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidants to protect against cell damage. Ananas sativus f. mordilona can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and poultices for topical application, and is often used in traditional medicine in tropical regions.
